title: Raspberry Fermented Yogurt Dessert
description: A refreshing dessert made with fermented yogurt, fresh raspberries, and a hint of sweetness.
instructions: 1. In a blender or food processor, combine the tender yogurt, raspberries, honey, and lemon juice.
3. Taste and adjust the sweetness and tartness to your liking.
4. Cover the bowl with a lid or plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 2 hours.
5. Before serving, give the mixture a good stir and adjust the consistency if needed.
6. Spoon the fermented yogurt into individual serving cups or a large serving dish.
7. Garnish with fresh raspberries, if desired.
